title: Punjab Congress Chief Files PIL in High Court Seeking Ban on Series 'Lawrence of Punjab'
description: Punjab Congress chief Amarinder Singh Raja Warring moves High Court seeking a ban on ZEE5’s ‘Lawrence of Punjab’, citing concerns over glorification of gangster Lawrence Bishnoi and its impact on youth. Punjab Congress chief Amarinder Singh Raja Warring moves High Court seeking a ban on ZEE5’s ‘Lawrence of Punjab’, citing concerns over glorification of gangster Lawrence Bishnoi and its impact on youth.
